title: Geezers Boxing 1Ltr Straw water Bottle/Spray bottle Squeezable Plastic, Wide Screw Top With Long Straw, Spray Nozzle Button, Boxing Sports Training Water Bottle
features: Screw top with straw with an additional spray nozzle provided to help keep the fighter cool during hard training sessions or fight nights.
Specially designed thermo plastic allows even pressure to dispense all liquid in bottle.
Keep cool and hydrated during training or fights
Geezers Straw Bottle is designed to help athletes wearing mouth guards, gloves and other obstructive equipment to easily drink water.
Ideal for corner men to provide water to boxers during a fight.

The attention to detail in their stitching and construction makes the gloves both sturdy and comfortable to wear for long training sessions. As well our gloves are designed to offer a snug fit that provides support and protection without compromising mobility. Are our products high quality?
